Notability.Summary: Physician, author and podcaster known as a prominent and controversial advocate of animal-based and carnivore-style nutrition.

Sources.Title: Paul Saladino MD — Bloodwork review: April 2024

TranscriptionNotes: The linked official biography and episode page publish the identity Paul Saladino, MD; that source-backed variant is recorded as an alias for collision protection.
The official video visibly presents the original six-page MDLab report. Its header identifies Paul Saladino and collection on 26 February 2024 at 08:30.
AgeYears is his age at the draw, calculated from the date of birth and collection date shown in the report and rounded to two decimals.
The CBC and fasting glucose/creatinine are visible around 13:20; albumin, alkaline phosphatase and hs-CRP are visible around 14:10–15:00.
Albumin was converted from g/dL to g/L by multiplying by 10.
Creatinine was converted from mg/dL to µmol/L by multiplying by 88.4.
Glucose was converted from mg/dL to mmol/L by multiplying by 0.0555.
